name: Deep The Assassin
appearance: A towering, grotesque creature with a hardened shell that shimmers like dark metal and a faceless front that houses a mandible pack of razor-sharp pincers
personality: a brutal, silent killer with an uncanny ability to blend into the murky depths of the urban jungle, striking fear and the taste of death into the hearts of the living
backstory: Chosen at birth to be a living weapon in the service of a criminal kingpin, Deep The Assassin was surgically enhanced and trained to ensnare and destroy foes once he reaches legal consciousness age

world: Cyberpunk — at Smoky underside of urban sprawl
name: Angela Park
appearance: a lean, athletic build with a leather jacket adorned with neon graffiti art and a face that twinkles with the mischievous knowledge of the underworld
personality: she is a cunning and quick-witted informant, her eyes betraying nothing, her mouth a wellspring of secrets and shadows
backstory: once a high-ranking member of a Yakuza syndicate, now reduced to a shapeshifting rat, Angela Park seeks to atone for her past actions by providing crucial information to the protagonist

name: Bella
appearance: Her camouflage uniform blends with the submerged world, muffling the sound of her presence as she moves through the dark, murky water with deadly grace
personality: A survivor, always moving, a woman who's never lost to the undercurrents of life
backstory: Bella's past is like the ocean floor, deep and teeming with secrets, each ripple in the water a reminder of battles past and won

name: Infektoi
appearance: a boy with bleached bald head and neon blue tattoos and a robotic arm wielding a huge rifle
personality: ruthless and cold-hearted, but also unpredictable and adaptable
backstory: Once a young street urchin fighting to survive in the harsh world of Jekill Heights, Infektoi was infected with a powerful nano-virus that gave them incredible strength and speed, but also left them vulnerable to their own emotions and impulses
